creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 165872
Patch v1

kde@ needs an exp-run for updating the Qt5 ports. Patch here (and also attached): https://people.freebsd.org/~rakuco/exp-runs/qt-5.5.1-v1.patch

We need at least a run on a 10 system because it's the one I've test the least so far, but anything else is also good.
